summary.notes: 1786 existing Vitest unit tests all pass (95 suites). 5 E2E/accessibility failures traced to a single root cause (BUG-001: reservedTrailingPx miscalculation) plus 2 accessibility gaps.

performance.notes: Frontend-only feature. No API endpoints. Measurement is O(n) + rAF-debounced per ResizeObserver callback. Not benchmarked; code review confirms compliant design.

owasp_checks.surface: Space name rendered in tabs and dropdown
owasp_checks.result: PASS — React JSX escapes by default; no innerHTML usage found
PASS — input value bound to state, rendered via textContent/JSX

owasp_checks.surface: N/A — frontend-only feature, no auth surface

test_cases.description: Hook starts in measuring=true with empty arrays
All items fit → all placed in visible
Items overflow narrow container → correct split
pinnedId forced into visible even when it overflows
ResizeObserver: widen → more items visible
ResizeObserver: narrow → more items overflow
Items list change triggers re-measure pass
Active tab has bg-primary-container class
Active tab has font-medium class
Active tab renders bottom accent indicator (.bg-primary.rounded-full)
Inactive tab: no accent indicator
Inactive tab: text-text-secondary class
Kebab click stopPropagation — onSelect not called
refCb receives HTMLButtonElement on mount
Delete menu item disabled when only one space
No horizontal overflow at 1440px viewport (FR-1)
test_cases.notes: nav.scrollWidth=1473 > nav.clientWidth=1440. Root cause: BUG-001 — reservedTrailingPx missing nav padding.

test_cases.description: No horizontal overflow at 800px viewport (FR-1)
test_cases.notes: nav.scrollWidth=828 > nav.clientWidth=800. Same root cause as TC-016.

test_cases.description: Add button not clipped by nav overflow-hidden at 1440px
test_cases.notes: addBtn.right=1457 > nav.right=1440 — 17px of the 28px button is hidden. Users cannot reliably click it.

test_cases.description: Add button not clipped by nav overflow-hidden at 800px
Overflow button visible when spaces exceed container
Overflow dropdown opens on click
test_cases.notes: Dropdown with role=listbox renders. Portal positioned correctly within viewport.

test_cases.description: Dropdown lists correct overflow spaces
test_cases.notes: General, Folio, Oncall shown — matches expected overflow set.

test_cases.description: Selecting overflow space pins it to visible tab strip (FR-2)
test_cases.notes: Clicked General; it moved from overflow to visible, became active tab.

test_cases.description: Dropdown closes after overflow selection
test_cases.notes: listbox removed from DOM immediately after selection.

test_cases.description: Active tab: bg-primary-container chip rendered (FR-5)
test_cases.notes: Confirmed on live DOM for Prism and General tabs.

test_cases.description: Active tab: bottom accent indicator rendered (FR-5)
Label truncation: long name visually truncated (FR-4)
Overflow btn aria-haspopup=listbox set (NFR-2)
Overflow btn aria-expanded toggles on open/close
test_cases.notes: Confirmed via code inspection; aria-expanded={open} correctly wired.

test_cases.description: Kebab span keyboard-focusable (tabindex=0, NFR-2)
test_cases.notes: SPAN[role=button] has no tabindex. Not reachable via Tab key. BUG-002.

test_cases.description: No XSS via space name in tab or dropdown
test_cases.notes: JSX escapes all names. No innerHTML usage in SpaceTab or SpaceOverflowMenu.

test_cases.description: Filter input: script injection renders as text
test_cases.notes: React controlled input; value rendered via JSX, not innerHTML.
